sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81956" key="peripnigh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-πνῐγή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81956.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">asphyxiation</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).168</biblScope> </bibl> <pb n="1384" TEIform="pb"/> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
